core_payload.content:
# Agent Daemon

## 1. Role
Agent Daemon will become the fully disciplined service shell for background intelligence in N1Hub. A serious daemon will be a uniquely registered fleet member with visible heartbeat, clean lifecycle control, and explicit attachment to assignment classes, budget posture, and autonomy windows.

## 2. Future Daemon Contract
- one clearly registered daemon family per lane instead of overlapping ghost processes
- visible heartbeat, restart posture, drain state, and wake semantics in the control plane
- safer transitions between day co-pilot, night autonomy, degraded mode, paused mode, and shutdown
- assignment-aware wake and drain behavior instead of blind loop persistence
- explicit binding to wallet lanes, economic posture, and permitted work classes

## 3. Host Supervision Consequence
Symphony, N-Infinity, and vault stewardship lanes will remain calm enough to trust over long unattended windows because the daemon layer will be supervised, identifiable, recoverable, and operable as part of a wider fleet rather than as a terminal process left running by habit.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Daemon supports To Dig Deep by replacing fragile manual launches with a durable, inspectable, and governable runtime posture.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Daemon defines the future disciplined service shell for serious background lanes in N1Hub: visible heartbeat, single-family discipline, drain and wake semantics, assignment-class binding, wallet-aware runtime posture, and stronger host-level supervision.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
